backlog.description: Review quest and adventure site definitions — confirm whether they need sharper separation or if current informal treatment is sufficient
backlog.notes: Currently quests appear inline in session logs and adventure sites have ad hoc stub files. May be fine as-is.

backlog.description: Update airth_campaign_state.json: level-ups for Strummer (4), Chekkad (4), Sardet (5), Zardoon (5); add Izen and Tafat; fix _settlements_file pointer to settlements/
backlog.notes: All four level-ups are from session 26. Izen and Tafat are Zack's characters and have no entry at all.
Antiquarian, tomb-diver, Aurka contacts. Zardoon's recurring contact. Source doc: OSSEK THRICE-BURIED Google Doc (session 26).
Illusionist hermit north of Orziben. Chekkad's trainer and ongoing mentor. Source doc: Chekkad's Training Google Doc (session 26).
Traveling lay-judge of Lugus, Marches circuit, originally Velgroth. Recurring antagonist/neutral figure. Source doc: strummer_training.md and lugazil_tagmira.md.
Ferryman/boatman in Caelrun. First appeared session 27. Minimal detail currently on record.

backlog.description: Add NPC record: unnamed Ardanir examiner at Veltharoch
backlog.notes: Older man, scar along jaw. Administered Sardet's level 5 examination and issued the Debt of Living Souls commission. Stub-level record is fine for now.

backlog.description: Resolve 'Pima' vs. 'Peema' — same NPC appears in airth_npcs.json and settlements/tagmira.json under different spellings
backlog.notes: Orphan girl with fairy mirror. Pick a spelling, remove the duplicate.

backlog.description: Resolve 'Zardun' vs. 'Zardoon' — campaign state uses Zardun, session logs use Zardoon
backlog.notes: Standardize across all files once spelling is confirmed.

backlog.description: Fix Leeandra's NPC record: thinks_with needs 'diplomacy', faction needs 'lizard-men'
backlog.notes: Record won't validate against airth_npcs.schema.json until these are corrected.

backlog.description: Develop tomb south of Dravesa — flesh out interior, jackalwere details, and inscription content before party returns
backlog.notes: Stub file exists at adventure_sites/tomb_south_of_dravesa.json. Ossek's interest is Ameniseb inscriptions and pre-Silence conditional immortality. Should tie to existing lore.

backlog.description: Add location record for Tazuln's shelter north of Orziben
backlog.notes: Hard to find — eleven holes in hillside ceiling, no path. Relevant to Chekkad's portal-hunting thread.
Party overnighted there in session 27. Flagged in dm_notes as pending. Adapted from Gnatdamp in Gygax Magazine #1 — full text in Andrew's Google Doc.

backlog.description: Document twelve-world cosmology in airth_campaign_main.json or airth_taxonomy.json
backlog.notes: Established as canon in session 26 via Chekkad's training. 12 worlds, 20 portals at vertices of a truncated dodecahedron. Illusions are resonance from adjacent worlds.
